description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a mix of dark and light exterior facades. The front of the house includes a covered entryway supported by columns, a driveway, and a visible garage space. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, with prominent dormer-style windows on the upper floor. The roof is mostly flat with some slight elevation changes and a stairway access point. The house sits on a paved lot with a small landscaped area and a wide sidewalk leading to the main entrance. The overall design blends modern and traditional elements, with clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A two-story house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, a columned entryway, and a mix of dark and light facades. Features include a garage, driveway, and landscaped front area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, garage, driveway, and landscaped area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the light facade, symmetrical window rows, and driveway extension.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, flat roof sections, and additional windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with dark facade, dormer windows, and paved lot visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Columned covered entryway with steps, overhang, and a prominent garage entrance
